name: watch-arbitrage-mcp
title: Watch Arbitrage Tracker (Patek/Rolex/AP)
description: Cross-platform price arbitrage tracker for pro watch dealers. Monitors Patek Philippe, Rolex, Audemars Piguet across 6 platforms (Chrono24, WatchBox/1916, Bobs Watches, Watchfinder UK, European Watch Co, Watches of Switzerland). Telegram + email alerts on >5% spreads.
